seo.title: Privacy policy
seo.description: SmartMall privacy policy – our commitment to protecting your personal data.

summary.title: Quick summary
summary.description: We collect the information needed to provide our services, protect data with SSL encryption, do not sell information to third parties, and give you full control over your personal data.

service.title: Provide services
service.description: Process orders, delivery, payment, and customer support

experience.title: Improve experience
experience.description: Personalize content and suggest suitable products

marketing.title: Marketing communication
marketing.description: Send promotions and new product updates only when you agree

securityCompliance.title: Security and compliance
securityCompliance.description: Detect fraud and comply with legal requirements

allowed: With delivery partners to deliver orders
With banks/payment gateways to process transactions
With legal authorities when there is a valid request

ssl.title: SSL/TLS encryption
ssl.description: All data is encrypted during transmission

firewall.title: Security firewall
firewall.description: A multi-layer firewall system protects the server

accessControl.title: Access control
accessControl.description: Only authorized employees can access data

backup.title: Regular backups
backup.description: Data is backed up regularly to ensure safety

userRights.know: The right to know about information collection and usage
userRights.accessEdit: The right to access and edit personal information
userRights.delete: The right to delete your account and personal data
userRights.unsubscribe: The right to opt out of promotional information
userRights.complain: The right to complain about privacy violations
userRights.copy: The right to request a copy of personal data

essential.title: Essential cookies
essential.description: Required for basic website operations such as sign-in, cart, and security. These cookies cannot be disabled.

performance.title: Performance cookies
performance.description: Help us understand how you use the website to improve the experience. Information is collected anonymously.

marketing.title: Marketing cookies
marketing.description: Used to show ads that match your interests on other websites. You can refuse this type of cookies.

whyCollect.question: Why do we need to collect personal information?
whyCollect.answer: We collect information to provide better services, process orders, support customers, and improve your shopping experience.

thirdParty.question: Is my information shared with third parties?
thirdParty.answer: We only share information with trusted partners needed to complete services such as delivery and payment, and we require them to protect information to high standards.

deleteAccount.question: Can I delete my account and data?
deleteAccount.answer: Yes, you can request account deletion at any time. We will delete all personal data within 30 days, except information required by law.

cookiesControl.question: How can I control cookies?
cookiesControl.answer: You can manage cookies through your browser settings. However, disabling cookies may affect some website features.

contactSection.title: 7. Contact information
contactSection.description: If you have any questions about this policy, please contact us through the channels below.

cookiesSection.title: 6. Cookies and tracking technologies
cookiesSection.description: We use cookies and similar technologies to improve the experience, remember preferences, and support essential website features.

dataCollectionSection.title: 1. Information collection
dataCollectionSection.description: We collect the following types of information to provide you with the best service:
dataCollectionSection.importantNoteDescription: We only collect necessary information with your consent. You may refuse to provide some information, but this may affect service quality.

informationSharingSection.title: 3. Information sharing
informationSharingSection.description: We may share your information in some necessary cases to operate the service, but always within appropriate and transparent limits.

contactModal.title: Contact us about privacy
contactModal.supportDescription: All privacy requests will be handled within 72 business hours.
contactModal.note: When contacting us, please provide your account information and clearly describe your request so we can support you quickly and accurately.

pageHeader.title: Privacy policy
pageHeader.description: We are committed to protecting your privacy and personal information safely and transparently.

securitySection.title: 4. Information security
securitySection.description: We apply necessary security measures to protect your information while you use our services.
securitySection.commitmentDescription: We comply with international security standards such as ISO 27001, GDPR, and Vietnamese data protection regulations.

userRightsSection.title: 5. User rights
userRightsSection.description: You have the following rights regarding your personal information:
userRightsSection.howToDescription: To exercise these rights, please contact us by email or hotline. We will respond within 72 hours.
